---
title: "Aggesden Vicarage, or, Bridget Storey\'s First Charge: A Tale for the Young"
---

## Aggesden Vicarage, or, Bridget Storey\'s First Charge: A Tale for the Young

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1859
**Imprint:** London: Parker

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
